meta.title: Air Force Jobs - Intelligence Gathering with Remote Piloted Aircraft
meta.description:
Intelligence Gathering with Remote Piloted Aircraft/ RPA involves the deployment of an unmanned aircraft, controlled from the Ground Control Station by a Pilot and the Sensor Operator. The Pilot flies the aircraft and the Sensor Operator controls the camera's and weapons.

Remote Piloted Aircraft's are used in both intelligence, surveillance and reconnaissance as well as close air support.  This both aids and protects ground troops. It also means that less troops are put in harms way.

Are you or a loved one about to become the future of the Air Force?

Stay connected at every step of the Air Force journey as well as getting  training advice every week with the Sandboxx app: https://link.sandboxx.us/youtube
